name.description: Display name of this lead source

kind.description: Source type: Google Sheets pull, or Ringba/TrueCall inbound call webhook

supplier_name.description: Supplier this source's leads are attributed to

campaign_id.description: Campaign this source's leads are attributed to

api_key_id.description: Reference to the ApiKey record used to authenticate ingestion through processLead

mapping.description: JSON object mapping source column/payload key -> our lead field name

sheet_id.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID (extracted from URL)

sync_interval.description: How often the scheduled sync pulls rows (Google Sheets only)

dedupe_column.description: Source column used as the de-dupe key; falls back to a hash of the whole row

seen_keys.description: JSON array of de-dupe markers already ingested, so the same row is not ingested twice

webhook_key.description: Secret key appended to the inbound call webhook URL (Ringba/TrueCall)

last_sync_status.description: Short result of the last sync/event e.g. 'Ingested 4 rows'

ingested_count.description: Total leads ingested through this source
